_authoring_notes: Phase 4a-hub Section 1 — Memberships hub HERO. REVISED 2026-04-28 EOD per Jonathan's hub-rebalancing direction.
Replaces the prior featured-Alliance hero (which was ~620px tall with logo + 4-up benefits + 2 CTAs — dominated the page).
Now: simple navy hub hero matching Communities hub structure. Eyebrow + H1 + tagline. Alliance gets its own umbrella band in Section 02.
Roboto Slab + text-transform:none overrides REMOVED — H1 inherits The7 default (Open Sans Condensed UPPERCASE bold). Brings Memberships hub typography in line with all other FSI Elementor pages.
Eyebrow 'Professional Memberships' replaces prior 'Membership Foundation' (latter was tied to the featured-Alliance treatment that's been demoted).

settings.html:
Professional Memberships

The seven memberships that organize this work.

Five Star Institute's professional memberships are the formal organizations through which practitioners join, govern, and lead the housing lifecycle. Every membership is by application; Five Star Alliance is the universal foundation underneath them all.
